title: aster gagei
intro: Aster gagei is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is also known as Gage's aster and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The aerial parts of the plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy among herbalists.
